name: S&P Global Market Intelligence API
what_it_does: S&P Global Market Intelligence REST APIs for financial data and analytics platform. Enables AI agents to manage equity and debt security fundamental data retrieval for financial modeling and research, handle S&P credit rating and outlook data access for credit risk analysis, access private company and private equity fund data for deal analysis and market intelligence, retrieve commodities price data from S&P Global Commodity Insights for energy and metals analytics, manage ESG and sustainability scoring data from S&P Global Sustainable1 for responsible investment, handle real estate and infrastructure data from S&P Global Real Assets for CRE and infrastructure investing, access insurance regulatory and financial data for insurance market analysis, retrieve news and events data for market intelligence and sentiment analysis, manage global company filings and regulatory document retrieval, and integrate financial intelligence data with investment management, risk, and analytics platforms.
use_cases: Accessing credit ratings from credit risk analysis agents
Retrieving private company data from M&A deal analysis agents
Analyzing commodities prices from energy trading agents
Scoring ESG performance from responsible investment agents
not_for: Retail investment without institutional data licensing requirements
Consumer-grade financial data without S&P Global data quality and coverage
Simple news aggregation without financial intelligence and analytical depth
best_when: An investment bank, asset manager, or corporate finance team using S&P Global Market Intelligence wants AI agents to automate credit analysis, private company research, commodities analytics, ESG scoring, and financial intelligence workflows.
avoid_when: LICENSING RISK: S&P Global data including credit ratings has strict redistribution and use case licensing — using ratings data in automated credit decisions requires specific licensing and regulatory review. Credit rating automation without human credit analyst review violates financial regulatory requirements. AI model training on licensed S&P Global data requires specific data licensing terms.

auth.notes: S&P Global uses OAuth 2.0 and API key. Per-organization credentials with data entitlements. Developer portal at developer.spglobal.com. No webhooks — polling and batch for data updates. REST API with JSON. New York, New York HQ. Public (SPGI NYSE). S&P Global merged with IHS Markit (2022, $44B). Formerly Capital IQ API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual data licensing with entitlement-based access
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual data license per dataset, use case, and redistribution rights
pricing.notes: New York, New York. Founded 1917 (Standard Statistics). Public (SPGI NYSE). $14B+ annual revenue. Financial intelligence market. S&P Dow Jones Indices, Ratings, Market Intelligence, Commodity Insights divisions. Merged with IHS Markit (2022). Capital IQ platform rebranded to Market Intelligence. Competes with Bloomberg and Refinitiv for institutional financial data.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; varies by data package and subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: LICENSING RISK: S&P credit ratings in automated decisions require SEC registered rating use licensing and compliance review; unauthorized credit rating automation violates financial regulations
Entitlement-based access — data access is gated by subscription entitlements; missing entitlements return empty results not errors; validate all required data entitlements before building
IHS Markit merger integration — S&P merged with IHS Markit (2022); some IHS Markit data products have separate API surfaces; verify which platform hosts your data
Capital IQ to Market Intelligence rebrand — Capital IQ API is now S&P Global Market Intelligence API; some documentation still references old Capital IQ branding
Private market data coverage — private company data has coverage gaps vs. public companies; validate universe coverage for your private market use case before building
No webhooks — data updates require polling or batch data delivery; schedule batch refreshes rather than real-time per-security polling for large universe updates
agent_readiness.security_notes: Financial intelligence and credit ratings. SOC2, GDPR, MiFID2. OAuth2. US/EU. Credit, fundamental, and market data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial intelligence. SOC2, MiFID2, SEC. OAuth2. US/EU. Credit ratings and market data.
